normalisation_rules: Top-level keys ordered to public schema
Missing public keys added as null

epic_sepsis.citation: Wong, A., Otles, E., Donnelly, J.P., et al. (2021) External validation of a widely implemented proprietary sepsis prediction model. JAMA Internal Medicine, 181(8), 1065-1070.
epic_sepsis.evidence_excerpt: *"poor discrimination and calibration in predicting the onset of sepsis"
epic_sepsis.case_summary: Widely deployed proprietary sepsis predictor with weak external discrimination/calibration and large alert burden.

optum_health.citation: Obermeyer, Z., Powers, B., Vogeli, C., and Mullainathan, S. (2019) Dissecting racial bias in an algorithm used to manage the health of populations. Science, 366(6464), 447-453.
optum_health.evidence_excerpt: *"The bias arises because the algorithm predicts health care costs rather than illness"
optum_health.case_summary: Canonical healthcare bias case where a cost proxy under-identified Black patients needing extra care.

google_dr.citation: Beede, E., Baylor, E., Hersch, F., et al. (2020) A human-centered evaluation of a deep learning system deployed in clinics for the detection of diabetic retinopathy. CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems.
google_dr.evidence_excerpt: *"several socio-environmental factors impact model performance, nursing workflows, and the patient experience"
google_dr.case_summary: Strong research model encountered image quality, workflow and implementation frictions in Thai clinics.

ibm_watson.citation: Ross, C. and Swetlitz, I. (2018) IBM Watson recommended unsafe and incorrect cancer treatments. STAT, 25 July 2018.
ibm_watson.source_type: Investigative reporting based on internal documents
ibm_watson.evidence_excerpt: *"multiple examples of unsafe and incorrect treatment recommendations"
ibm_watson.case_summary: Vendor-promoted oncology recommendation system reportedly generated unsafe treatment advice in practice.

google_flu.citation: Lazer, D., Kennedy, R., King, G., and Vespignani, A. (2014) The parable of Google Flu: traps in big data analysis. Science, 343(6176), 1203-1205.
google_flu.evidence_excerpt: *"predicting more than double the proportion of doctor visits"
google_flu.case_summary: Canonical drift and proxy-failure case where search-query model materially overestimated influenza-like illness.

babylon.citation: Fraser, H., Coiera, E., and Wong, D. (2018) Safety of patient-facing digital symptom checkers. The Lancet, 392(10161), 2263-2264.
babylon.evidence_excerpt: *"claims have been made that SC from Babylon Health is more accurate at diagnosis than physicians"
babylon.case_summary: Evidence hierarchy case: strong public performance claims challenged for lacking convincing independent substantiation.

compas.citation: Angwin, J., Larson, J., Mattu, S., and Kirchner, L. (2016) Machine Bias. ProPublica.
compas.source_type: Investigative data analysis / canonical fairness case
compas.evidence_excerpt: *"Black defendants were still 77 percent more likely to be pegged as at higher risk"
compas.case_summary: Cross-sector fairness exemplar with racially disparate error rates and opaque proprietary scoring.

amazon_recruiting.citation: Dastin, J. (2018) Amazon scraps secret AI recruiting tool that showed bias against women. Reuters, 10 October 2018.
amazon_recruiting.evidence_excerpt: *"their new recruiting engine did not like women"
amazon_recruiting.case_summary: Hiring model trained on male-dominated historical resumes learned to disadvantage women.

uk_alevels.citation: Office of Qualifications and Examinations Regulation (Ofqual) (2020) Awarding GCSE, AS, A level, advanced extension awards and extended project qualifications in summer 2020: interim report.
uk_alevels.evidence_excerpt: *"the statistical model will consider prior attainment at school or college level, not at individual student level"
uk_alevels.case_summary: High-stakes public-sector standardisation used group-level historical performance and produced distributional unfairness.

microsoft_tay.citation: Neff, G. and Nagy, P. (2016) Talking to bots: Symbiotic agency and the case of Tay. International Journal of Communication, 10, 4915-4931.
microsoft_tay.evidence_excerpt: *"Tay was shut down after one day because of its obscene and inflammatory tweets"
microsoft_tay.case_summary: Generative chatbot rapidly exploited by users, producing harmful content after launch.

gender_shades.citation: Buolamwini, J. and Gebru, T. (2018) Gender shades: Intersectional accuracy disparities in commercial gender classification. Proceedings of Machine Learning Research, 81, 1-15.
gender_shades.evidence_excerpt: *"darker-skinned females are the most misclassified group"
gender_shades.case_summary: Canonical subgroup performance disparity case across commercial facial analysis systems.

uber_av.citation: National Transportation Safety Board (2019) Collision between vehicle controlled by developmental automated driving system and pedestrian, Tempe, Arizona, March 18, 2018. Highway Accident Report HAR-19-03.
uber_av.evidence_excerpt: *"an automated test vehicle struck and fatally injured a 49-year-old pedestrian"
uber_av.case_summary: Safety-critical transport analogue with failure of perception, safety architecture, and human oversight.
